{{CargoRelic
|name=Soil Cube
|class_id=20635
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This 1 cubic meter of fertile soil is a joyous land for greenery to flourish. Sow the seeds of hope here and await the emergence of trees breaking through the soil, reaching towards the sky!
|fame=14
|art=31
|fth=16
|civ=13
|tech=16
|ss1=Earth DMG +4<br>Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +2<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000
|ss2=Earth DMG +8<br>Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +4<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000
|ss3=Earth DMG +12<br>Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +6<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000
|ss4=Earth DMG +12<br>Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +6<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000
|ss7=Earth DMG +12<br>Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +6<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000<br> (Awakened)
}}
